/usr/bin/c++ -g -rdynamic -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/gbe_plus_qt.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/gbe_plus_qt.dir/gbe_plus_qt_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gbe_plus_qt.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gbe_plus_qt.dir/main_menu.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gbe_plus_qt.dir/render.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gbe_plus_qt.dir/general_settings.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gbe_plus_qt.dir/qt_common.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gbe_plus_qt.dir/cgfx.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gbe_plus_qt.dir/debug_dmg.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gbe_plus_qt.dir/screens.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gbe_plus_qt.dir/data_dialog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gbe_plus_qt.dir/cheat_menu.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gbe_plus_qt.dir/rtc_menu.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gbe_plus_qt.dir/pp2_menu.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gbe_plus_qt.dir/zzh_menu.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gbe_plus_qt.dir/ogl_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gbe_plus_qt.dir/con_ir_menu.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gbe_plus_qt.dir/ps_menu.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gbe_plus_qt.dir/mpos_menu.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gbe_plus_qt.dir/tbf_menu.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gbe_plus_qt.dir/utp_menu.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gbe_plus_qt.dir/magic_reader_menu.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gbe_plus_qt.dir/mw_menu.cpp.o -o gbe_plus_qt  ../common/libcommon.a ../gba/libgba.a ../dmg/libdmg.a ../sgb/libsgb.a ../nds/libnds.a ../min/libmin.a -Wl,-Bstatic -lSDL2main -Wl,-Bdynamic -lSDL2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5OpenGL.so.5.15.13 ../common/libcommon.a -Wl,-Bstatic -lSDL2main -Wl,-Bdynamic -lSDL2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Widgets.so.5.15.13 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Gui.so.5.15.13 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Core.so.5.15.13
